RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court inquires about service on Mr. Rosales. Counsel updates the Court of the status of the case. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction.

Off calendar in light of parties' stipulation for entry of judgment. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William N. Grosswendt, Esq. of LOEB & LOEB, LLP, T:310.282.2000, for plaintiff/moving party, on Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CBS INTERACTIVE, INC.'s MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE, as follows:

Plaintiff CBS Interactive, Inc.'s application for the pro hac vice admission of Wook Hwang is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
